utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hi uh , I am Joey Tribbiani and with all do respect I would like to donate some fluids .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I would like to donate some fluids .

utterances.speaker: Receptionist
utterances.text: We are actually at the end of one of our research cycles , so we are not looking for applicants right now .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh that is too bad . I have kinda been saving up . Uh , are you sure there is no studies I can participate in ?

utterances.speaker: Receptionist
utterances.text: Well , here is a schedule of what coming up .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Thanks . Well but this one starts now .

utterances.speaker: Receptionist
utterances.text: Oh that one is available now , but only identical twins are eligible . It is a twins study .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well how about this one ? Testing the effects of Joey Tribbiani on attractive nurse receptionists .

emotion_cause.span: 9_Testing the effects of Joey Tribbiani on attractive nurse receptionists .

utterances.speaker: Receptionist
utterances.text: We already got the results back on that on , and they are not good .

emotion_cause.span: 9_Testing the effects of Joey Tribbiani on attractive nurse receptionists .
